data.title: 国际服卡池复刻「I'm all ready. Let's go! We've got quests to clear! & I'm the best player around! I'll help you out.」

data.body:
[Pick Up Recruitment Preview]

Rerun Pick Up Recruitments will begin on 10/25 (Tue)!
Target Pick Up Student: 3★ Midori & 2★Momoi

Pick Up Recruitment Period: 10/25 (Tue) 02:00 – 11/1 (Tue) 02:00 (UTC) Before Maintenance![YNSlrGtmwYP2EodSXrHupfvcya4H21uR.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/YNSlrGtmwYP2EodSXrHupfvcya4H21uR.jpg)
